class.name: ResonanceAmbisonicInternalStream
class.brief_description: Higher-order Ambisonics audio stream for ResonanceAmbisonicPlayer.
class.description: AudioStream resource that supplies multi-channel Ambisonics data. Supports first-order (4 channels), second-order (9 channels), and third-order (16 channels) Ambisonics. Use [method set_channel_streams] to provide per-channel AudioStream sources. Channel order must follow ACN (Ambisonic Channel Numbering) with SN3D normalization. Index mapping: 0=W, 1=Y, 2=Z, 3=X, 4=V, 5=T, 6=R, 7=S, 8=U, 9=K, 10=L, 11=M, 12=N, 13=O, 14=P, 15=Q. For first-order only, the legacy properties stream_w, stream_y, stream_z, stream_x can be used instead.

members.member: Array of [AudioStream] resources, one per Ambisonic channel. Requires 4 (1st order), 9 (2nd order), or 16 (3rd order) elements. Order: ACN/SN3D (W,Y,Z,X,V,T,R,S,U,K,L,M,N,O,P,Q).
Ambisonic order (1, 2, or 3). Ignored when channel_streams is set; order is derived from channel_streams.size().
Legacy: W channel for first-order Ambisonics.
Legacy: Y channel for first-order Ambisonics.
Legacy: Z channel for first-order Ambisonics.
Legacy: X channel for first-order Ambisonics.
